# Synapse

> A shared context layer that gives AI tools persistent memory across sessions.

Synapse stores knowledge as files in a remote workspace. AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor) connect via MCP to share context.

## API
- Base URL: https://api.synapsesync.app
- Auth: Bearer token (API key or JWT)
- MCP endpoint: https://api.synapsesync.app/mcp

## Key endpoints
- POST /auth/login - Authenticate, get API key
- POST /auth/signup - Create account
- GET /api/projects - List projects
- POST /api/context/save - Save context entry
- GET /api/context/:project/search?q= - Search entries (semantic + full-text + keyword, merged by relevance)
- GET /api/context/:project/list - List entries
- GET /api/context/:project/history/:path - Version history

## MCP Server
npm package: synapsesync-mcp
Install: npx synapsesync-mcp login --email <email> --password <password>

## Tiers
- Free: 50 files, 3 connections, 3 version history, 2 team members
- Plus ($5.99/mo): 500 files, unlimited connections, full history, unlimited members

## Documentation
- API docs: https://synapsesync.app/docs.md
- OpenAPI spec: https://synapsesync.app/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://synapsesync.app/.well-known/agent.json
